title: [CI:DOCS] Add missing pages for docs.podman.io
body:
Lots of references to man pages missing from docs.podman.io

Also fix sort order in man page.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @edsantiago I think we need you man page test script to also monitor these files.
LGTM, but CI gremlins are active
Yes @ashley-cui But I do not know how that is done. Can we do this in a different PR?

First-pass results of cross-checking `podman help` against `docs/source/*.rst`:
```
no link in *.rst for podman container unmount
no link in *.rst for podman image trust set
no link in *.rst for podman image trust show
no link in *.rst for podman manifest add
no link in *.rst for podman manifest annotate
no link in *.rst for podman manifest create
no link in *.rst for podman manifest inspect
no link in *.rst for podman manifest push
no link in *.rst for podman manifest remove
no link in *.rst for podman manifest
no link in *.rst for podman system connection add
no link in *.rst for podman system connection default
no link in *.rst for podman system connection list
no link in *.rst for podman system connection remove
no link in *.rst for podman system connection rename
no link in *.rst for podman unmount
no link in *.rst for podman untag
```
Feel like addressing that in this PR, or should I file an issue?

(I will submit my cross-checker script later, for inclusion in CI, but only once these discrepancies are resolved)

@edsantiago I fixed them, other then
no link in *.rst for podman image trust set
no link in *.rst for podman image trust show

These don't have a man page to link against.  They are explained in the primary man page.

For now, can you just modify your test to ignore these.
@rhatdan could you rename the new file to `manifest.rst` ("i" replaces the second "a", and singular, not plural)?

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
